nodes.name: Dyaphorophyia
nodes.summary: Dyaphorophyia（Dyaphorophyia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Chestnut wattle-eye、West African wattle-eye、White-spotted wattle-eye。

nodes.name: White-spotted wattle-eye
nodes.summary: White-spotted wattle-eye（Dyaphorophyia tonsa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-spotted wattle-eye。

nodes.name: White-spotted wattle-eye
nodes.summary: The white-spotted wattle-eye (Dyaphorophyia tonsa) is a species of bird in the wattle-eye family Platysteiridae. It is found in Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, and Nigeria. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
